description: Campus safety needs to review security camera footage following a report of a bicycle theft.

nodes.task_description: Identify the location and time frame of the reported theft.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the incident occurred near the library between 2 PM and 4 PM.

nodes.task_description: Access the video management system and retrieve footage from the relevant cameras and time frame.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully pulls the requested video clips.

nodes.task_description: Securely save the relevant footage as evidence and attach it to the incident report.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent archives the video evidence in accordance with policy.
